detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Ti._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Ti.sol#633-749):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Ti.sol#695)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Ti.sol#763-775)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Ti.sol#701)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Ti.sol#783)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Ti.sol#747)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Ti.sol#925)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Ti.sol#905)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Ti.sol#907)
	Ti._rOwned (Ti.sol#323) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Ti._takeTeam(uint256) (Ti.sol#919-927)
	- Ti._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Ti.sol#879-915)
	- Ti.balanceOf(address) (Ti.sol#459-463)
	- Ti.constructor() (Ti.sol#405-423)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Ti.sol#747)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Ti.sol#933)
	Ti._rTotal (Ti.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Ti._getCurrentSupply() (Ti.sol#1075-1085)
	- Ti._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Ti.sol#931-937)
	- Ti.constructor() (Ti.sol#405-423)
	- Ti.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Ti.sol#555-577)
detectors.markdown:

	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Ti.sol#L747)

	[Ti._rTotal](Ti.sol#L335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
